message:
fix(parser): allow compound SELECT ORDER BY to reference output expressions from any arm

SQLite permits ORDER BY terms in compound SELECTs (UNION, INTERSECT,
EXCEPT) to match a projected expression verbatim even when the
underlying table aliases are out of scope at the compound boundary.
The semantic resolver now checks all compound arms for matching output
expressions before flagging an unresolved reference.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
